description: Product descriptionBlack sleeveless, boat neck top made of 100% viscose, with metallic embellishments on the left shoulder and maxi cut along the right lengthFittingRegularWash careMachine wash or hand wash separatelyUse mild detergent onlyDo not bleachDo not wringDry in shadeMedium iron onlyStylish and sheek, this black top from jealous 21's Jealous 19 range is a great evening wear. Perfect for weekend parties, the maxi cut along the right length adds to it a stylish edge, while the metallic embellishments on the left shoulder give it a feminine touch. Made of viscose rayon, this top has a silky appearance and feel, but allows your body to breathe as well as it does in cotton weaves. Pair this top with jeans or short denim skirts, and stylish feminine sandals available in a wide range at myntra.Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-5.6", Chest-32"
